description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the inovex/gitlab-ci-android:25 Docker image, set GRADLE_OPTS to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false, and include a before_script that exports GRADLE_USER_HOME=$(pwd)/.gradle, makes ./gradlew executable, and synchronizes and updates all git submodules recursively. Define a single build stage and a cache keyed by ${CI_PROJECT_ID} that caches the .gradle/ directory. Add a lintDebug job in the build stage that runs ./gradlew -Pci --console=plain lintDebug -PbuildDir=lint. Add a spotlessCheck job in the build stage that runs ./gradlew spotlessCheck. Add an assembleDebug job in the build stage that runs ./gradlew assembleDebug and stores app/build/outputs/ as an artifact, and an assembleRelease job in the same stage that runs ./gradlew assembleRelease and also stores app/build/outputs/ as an artifact.
